arts.ttl: Leeds United must have realistic 9-goal alternative lined up if Boro agreement fails
arts.sum: Leeds United are said to be eyeing an ambitious move to sign Emmanuel Latte Lath from Middlesbrough this month, but they have to be considering a more realistic backup plan meanwhile. His striker contingent is doing reasonably well with 13 goals and eight assists between them, the majority coming from Joel Piroe, but there is still a craving for another option to help fire Leeds back to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ex-Leeds player and Harrogate Town boss Neil Aspin makes loyalties clear for FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Having made his debut for Leeds aged just 16 in 1982, Neil Aspin racked up more than 200 games - but also had a big influence on their FA Cup opponents who they meet in an historic clash

arts.ttl: One Leeds United outfielder simply has to start today, even if he’s barely featured all season
arts.sum: Leeds United welcome Harrogate Town to Elland Road this evening, and it’s surely a perfect opportunity for Isaac Schmidt to finally get a start. Leeds have bigger fish to fry than an FA Cup run in 2025, but their home meeting with Harrogate Town gives Daniel Farke a good chance to take inventory with his squad.

arts.ttl: Leeds in pole position to sign Tottenham hero in bargain deal
arts.sum: Although Tottenham have ongoing defensive struggles, there’s every chance that Ben Davies could be snapped up by Leeds in the transfer window. Daniel Farke had hinted that Leeds would make signings this month, and with Ange Postecoglou’s Tottenham future uncertain, it could be the right time for Davies to look for pastures new. According to […] The post Leeds in pole position to sign Tottenham hero in bargain deal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds United vs Harrogate Town postponement latest as ice threatens FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Leeds United and Harrogate Town fans will be keeping a close eye on the weather forecast for the remainder of Friday and Saturday amid fears of an FA Cup postponement this weekend. Daniel Farke's side welcome the League Two opposition to Elland Road for the very first time in a competitive fixture.

arts.ttl: Crysencio Summerville could be dealt another blow after Leeds United exit
arts.sum: He could potentially be given a fresh start under new West Ham manager Graham Potter, who was unveiled on Thursday morning, but the latest transfer links suggests that he could fall further down the pecking order. Former Leeds United winger Crysencio Summerville has struggled to establish himself at West Ham United since his summer move from Elland Road to the London Stadium.

arts.ttl: Who is Mergim Berisha? Hoffenheim striker profiled as Leeds United 'eye' transfer raid
arts.sum: Leeds United links with Hoffenheim striker Mergim Berisha have re-emerged amid Patrick Bamford's injury setback. After signing a four-year deal, Berisha failed to net in his first seven Hoffenheim matches before then suffering an ACL tear in early November 2023.

arts.ttl: Leeds United injury list and return dates for Harrogate Town and Sheffield Wednesday tests
arts.sum: Farke said at his pre-match press conference that Struijk has resumed team training. Farke said Firpo, whose contract expires at the end of the season, would be out of action for four to six weeks.

arts.ttl: Hopeful transfer audition awaits today for Leeds United’s talented duo
arts.sum: Leeds United take on League Two club Harrogate Town in the FA Cup Third Round this evening, and with that, there ought to be some rotation from Daniel Farke to allow opportunities for his fringe players. In particular, James Debayo at centre-back and Charlie Crew in midfield both featured away at Harrogate in pre-season, impressing in the process too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Harrogate Town with quintet ruled out of FA Cup test
arts.sum: Leeds United head into today's clash with Harrogate Town missing a number of players due to injury. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community
